actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / higher-shell Schur scalar-LSZ chunk021 row checkpoint

source_higgs_aliases.strict_limit: C_sx/C_xx aliases are second-source taste-radial rows.  They are not canonical-Higgs C_sH/C_HH rows unless a separate canonical O_H/source-overlap bridge passes.

exact_next_action: Accumulate completed higher-shell chunks, run this checkpoint on each, combine higher-shell rows, then run complete-monotonicity, threshold/model-class/pole/FV/IR, and canonical-source bridge gates.
proposal_allowed_reason: A single completed higher-shell chunk is partial row support only.  It does not identify the taste-radial source with canonical O_H, does not derive kappa_s, and does not provide complete monotonicity, pole/FV/IR, or retained-route authority.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not treat one higher-shell chunk as a complete scalar-LSZ row packet
does not treat C_sx/C_xx as canonical-Higgs C_sH/C_HH
does not claim complete monotonicity, scalar pole authority, FV/IR authority, canonical O_H, source-overlap, or W/Z response
does not set kappa_s = 1, c2 = 1, or Z_match = 1
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0
